title: Fix production site missing styles on autocashback.dev
description: Investigate why https://www.autocashback.dev/ loads without page styles in production. Check rendered HTML, CSS asset URLs, proxy/static serving, and recent frontend build changes. Implement and verify the fix.
close_reason: Fixed standalone startup asset mapping so .next/static and public are available under the standalone app root, restoring CSS asset responses in production.

title: 优化 dashboard 风险区与账号统计
description: 修复 /dashboard 中优先处理与风险提醒区块在当前布局下出现重叠/拥挤的问题，并在摘要区增加账号维度统计数据。
close_reason: 拆分 dashboard 的优先处理与风险提醒区块，并补充账号维度统计

title: 继续压缩 admin users 列宽与信息编排
description: 进一步减少 /admin/users 列表横向占用：移除独立角色列、合并时间信息列、继续收紧弹窗宽度和操作区布局，使常见桌面宽度下无需横向滚动。
close_reason: 继续压缩 admin users 列宽，合并角色与时间列并收紧相关弹窗宽度

title: 优化 admin users 列表密度与弹窗交互
description: 修复 /admin/users 列表行内容未垂直居中、列宽过宽导致操作列挤压与横向滚动；收紧新建用户及相关操作弹窗宽度，并将重置密码、停用账户等原生 confirm 交互替换为友好的对话框。
close_reason: 压缩 admin users 表格列宽与弹窗宽度，并用页内确认对话框替换原生 confirm

title: 继续统一 settings 与 dashboard 页面骨架
description: 继续按 autobb 的业务结构和布局实现优化，优先统一 settings-manager 与 dashboard-client-page 的页面骨架，进一步降低说明性模块并提高信息密度。
close_reason: 完成 settings、dashboard、login 与首页入口骨架收紧，移除冗余概览卡片并提升信息密度

title: 继续统一剩余页面骨架以贴近 autobb
description: 继续按 autobb 的业务结构和布局实现优化，优先统一 settings、dashboard、marketing/login 等仍保留较多自定义页面骨架的区域。
notes: 追加完成 google-ads、link-swap、click-farm、admin-users 顶部骨架收紧：移除剩余 metric 卡，统一为紧凑汇总带，并压缩 admin-users 顶部摘要区。当前主要剩余为少量入口页/细节层级的视觉一致性清理。
close_reason: 收紧 dashboard、login、marketing 尾部结构并完成本轮 autobb 风格统一

title: 仅通过 HTTP git 链路完成远端同步
description: 按用户要求停止使用 GitHub API，只允许通过 HTTP git push / pull 处理远端同步，并检查当前本地与 origin 状态是否一致。
close_reason: 已改回仅使用 HTTP git 链路校验远端状态，并通过 HTTP fetch 确认 origin/main

title: 修复 queue 页面双 h1 的可访问性冲突
description: 人工回归发现 /queue 页面同时渲染了 QueueMonitor 的 PageHeader 和内嵌 AdminOperationsMonitor 的 PageHeader，实际 DOM 存在两个 h1（统一队列控制台、业务运营控制台），不满足 docs/后台UI优化方案-对标autobb.md 中 Phase 2 PageHeader 避免页面双标题的 a11y 要求。需要将内嵌运营面板改为非 h1 标题层级或复用不同标题组件。
close_reason: 已修复 queue 页面双 h1：将内嵌 AdminOperationsMonitor 的顶层页头改为嵌入式 h2 标题，浏览器复核 /queue 仅保留一个 h1；lint/type-check/test/build 通过。

title: 统一后台通用错误反馈为 toast-first
description: 对照 docs/后台UI优化方案-对标autobb.md，修正 queue-monitor、admin-operations-monitor、admin-users-manager 的通用错误反馈，去除页面级/动作级内联红字，保留字段级与业务状态说明。
close_reason: 通用错误反馈已统一为 toast-first，并完成 lint/type-check/test/build 验证

title: [Phase 2] 完整落地后台 UI 优化方案剩余项
description: 对照 docs/后台UI优化方案-对标autobb.md，完成剩余后台 UI/UX 优化项，包括共享组件推广、Settings Tabs/hash 兼容、顶栏/侧栏/列表操作重构、空态/骨架/描述统一，以及文档中列出的清理与一致性问题修复。
close_reason: Implemented remaining backend UI optimization plan items across layout, settings tabs, shared UI adoption, list actions, and regression guards

title: [Phase 0] 清理 UI 工程瑕疵 + 移除命令面板

close_reason: 完成 Phase 0：清理非法 amber class 与 tracking-tight 重复，删除 5 个副本文件和命令面板，修复 offers-manager 空代码块，并移除未使用的 cmdk 依赖；lint/type-check/test/build 全部通过。

title: Continue remaining control-surface optimization after queue
description: Continue optimizing remaining autocashback control surfaces after queue. Audit components and embedded admin panels that still use older layout patterns, then implement the next highest-value control-console refinement while preserving existing behavior and product semantics.
close_reason: Completed admin operations monitor and admin users console refinement, plus added derived-state coverage tests.

title: Continue post-accounts optimization for remaining control surfaces
description: Continue optimizing the remaining autocashback control surfaces after accounts, offers, and click-farm. Identify the next highest-value module to convert into the unified control-console pattern, reusing autobb implementation approaches where semantics overlap and preserving autocashback's product framing and green UI language.
notes: Optimized the queue module into a unified control console. Added overview metrics, search/sort/filter support for queue tasks, scheduler health/risk surfacing, a dedicated configuration panel, and preserved existing manual dispatch/config save behaviors with derived-state helpers and tests.
close_reason: Completed the next control-surface optimization slice by rebuilding queue into a unified control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Continue UI parity optimization after click-farm
description: Continue improving remaining autocashback modules after offers and click-farm. Audit the remaining in-app pages, identify the next highest-confidence module for autobb-style control-console alignment, and implement the next optimization slice while preserving autocashback semantics and green design language.
notes: Optimized the accounts module into a control-console layout tailored to autocashback. Added overview metrics, linked-offer visibility, filter/sort controls, operational reminders, and a focused account editor while preserving existing APIs and green UI language.
close_reason: Completed the next optimization slice by rebuilding accounts into a control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Continue parity optimization for remaining overlapping UI modules
description: Continue aligning remaining autocashback modules with autobb implementation patterns where semantics overlap, while preserving autocashback product positioning and green visual system. Audit remaining app pages and optimize the next highest-confidence module.
notes: Optimized the click-farm module into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics. Added overview metrics, filter/sort controls, task health reminders, and a focused task creation/edit entry while reusing the existing click-farm dialog and APIs.
close_reason: Completed the next parity slice by rebuilding click-farm into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Align overlapping autocashback features with autobb implementations
description: User requested a project-wide rule: whenever autocashback has functionality similar to autobb, reuse autobb's implementation approach for frontend UI/UX (while preserving autocashback's green visual direction) and backend APIs/business logic. Audit overlapping features, identify parity gaps, and migrate the highest-confidence overlapping modules.
notes: Dashboard, link-swap, settings, google-ads, and now offers all use autobb-style control-console structures adapted to autocashback semantics. Offers now has overview metrics, guided filters, action-focused reminders, and a management-console editor without importing unrelated autobb business concepts.
close_reason: Completed the remaining major parity slice by rebuilding offers into an autobb-style control console adapted to autocashback semantics.

title: Align admin users page with autobb implementation
description: Compare /admin/users in this project with the corresponding user management implementation in the local autobb project, then bring UI/UX and functional behavior back in line where intended.
close_reason: Aligned /admin/users with autobb-style management flows by adding search, sorting, pagination, edit/delete, reset password, and login history APIs plus a redesigned management console UI.

title: Remove internal implementation notes from user-facing copy
description: Audit user-facing copy across the system and remove internal/developer-facing wording such as implementation notes, cross-project references, and operator guidance that should not be shown to end users. Replace with concise product copy and verify affected routes/components.
close_reason: Removed internal implementation notes and cross-project references from user-facing copy across dashboard, settings, security, monitoring, queue, and seeded platform notes.

title: Fix standalone instrumentation hook runtime error
description: Production standalone startup logs show repeated 'Failed to prepare server ... instrumentation hook: require is not defined'. Trace the instrumentation hook code path in apps/web, fix the runtime incompatibility, and verify startup behavior.
close_reason: Reduced web instrumentation hook to zero-dependency logging so standalone startup no longer throws 'require is not defined' while runtime DB init remains handled outside the hook.

title: Fix missing app-shell module breaking Next.js build
description: next build currently fails in apps/web/app/(app)/layout.tsx because '@/components/app-shell' cannot be resolved. This blocks full standalone runtime verification for the web startup warning fix.
close_reason: Verified current main no longer reproduces the app-shell build failure: next build passes and standalone startup works with instrumentation enabled.

title: Fix scheduler startup Postgres parameter typing failure
description: Scheduler crashes on startup with PostgresError 42P18: could not determine data type of parameter . Trace the startup query, fix SQL parameter typing, and verify scheduler can boot cleanly.
close_reason: Fixed getSettings Postgres query construction so scheduler queue config bootstrap no longer hits 42P18 on startup.

title: Implement remaining autobb-aligned optimizations
description: Implement remaining reusable autobb-aligned optimizations for autocashback except settings import/export and docs cleanup: auth security, audit logs, admin business monitoring, Google Ads diagnostics, frontend API error handling, and validator refactors.
close_reason: Implemented remaining autobb-aligned auth, monitoring, Google Ads diagnostics, frontend resilience, and admin scheduler capabilities

title: Harden docs and align implementations with autobb
description: Keep docs local only, remove sensitive exposure paths, align Google Ads OAuth/credentials handling, click-farm task model, and queue monitoring/scheduler controls with latest autobb implementation, then verify and push.
close_reason: Implemented OAuth hardening, client-side secret redaction, admin-only queue controls, click-farm single-task enforcement, migrations, and tests

title: Re-audit GoogleAds ClickFarm landing after settings token fix
description: Re-check the implementation against the intended Google Ads + click-farm scope after moving refresh-token display to /settings, using code as source of truth.
close_reason: Re-audited after the settings refresh-token fix. By the confirmed acceptance criteria, the code is fully landed; only the doc wording about /google-ads is now stale.

title: Show refresh token in Google Ads UI
description: Align Google Ads pages with the implementation record by exposing and rendering the stored refresh token in the credentials status returned to the UI.
close_reason: Exposed refreshToken in Google Ads credential status, rendered it in /settings under the Google Ads API section, and added SQLite regression coverage.

title: Audit GoogleAds ClickFarm implementation against code
description: Review docs/GoogleAds-ClickFarm-实施记录.md against the actual codebase and assess whether the described implementation is fully landed, using code as the source of truth.
close_reason: Audited docs/GoogleAds-ClickFarm-实施记录.md against code and found one remaining mismatch: the UI only shows Refresh Token status, not the token itself as documented.

title: Continue optimizing scheduler start-time gating
description: Inspect remaining unified queue scheduler paths for start-time gating gaps, especially link-swap enable/manual trigger behavior, and reuse autobb patterns to prevent premature enqueue or stale scheduling.
close_reason: Aligned link-swap due-task orchestration with autobb-style gating by preserving next_run_at in scheduler input, ordering by due time, and skipping tasks before activation start.

title: Continue optimizing scheduler execution idempotency
description: Inspect click-farm and link-swap executor idempotency and queue hygiene, and reuse stable autobb patterns to prevent duplicate execution or stale scheduled work.
close_reason: Aligned click-farm future scheduling with autobb-style start-date gating, prevented immediate enqueue for future tasks, and added regression coverage.

title: Continue optimizing queue scheduler edge cases
description: Inspect remaining queue scheduler and task orchestration edge cases, and reuse stable autobb patterns to prevent stale or duplicate scheduling behavior.
close_reason: Reused autobb-style queue cleanup for automatic task shutdown paths so auto pause, auto complete, and auto expire also remove pending unified queue tasks; added sqlite integration coverage.

title: Continue optimizing queue orchestration behavior
description: Inspect remaining queue orchestration edge cases and reuse stable autobb behavior to remove duplicate or stale task scheduling paths.
close_reason: Reused autobb-style queue cleanup for rescheduling paths so updating, restarting, enabling, and swap-now flows clear stale pending unified queue tasks before new scheduling; added sqlite integration coverage.

title: Continue optimizing Google Ads and task orchestration rollout
description: Review the current Google Ads, link swap, click farm, and queue orchestration implementation against autobb patterns and harden any remaining code-level gaps or rough edges.
close_reason: Reused autobb queue-cleanup logic to remove pending unified queue tasks when link swap tasks are disabled, click farm tasks are stopped or deleted, and offers are deleted; added sqlite integration coverage.

title: Continue hardening GoogleAds ClickFarm rollout parity
description: Keep reconciling the implementation record with code and close any remaining code-level gaps so the rollout is fully landed in behavior, cleanup, and UI feedback.

title: Close remaining gaps in GoogleAds ClickFarm rollout
description: Implement the missing code paths needed to fully land the Google Ads and Click Farm rollout, based on the prior code audit findings and the implementation record.

title: Audit GoogleAds ClickFarm implementation against recorded rollout
description: Review only the code implementation for Google Ads and Click Farm related rollout and assess whether the recorded implementation appears fully landed, without relying on docs as the source of truth.

title: 排查 docs 本地文件被删除原因

title: Align database initialization flow with autobb startup model
description: Refactor autocashback so database bootstrap runs at startup like autobb, with controlled runtime fallback instead of relying on login-triggered lazy initialization.
close_reason: Aligned startup database bootstrap with autobb-style entrypoint plus Next runtime fallback and request short-circuiting.

title: Fix pg migration path resolution during login
description: Investigate and fix runtime migration path resolution so login does not fail with 'Migration directory not found: /app/apps/web/pg-migrations'.
close_reason: Resolved migration directory lookup by searching ancestor directories and added regression tests.

title: Align homepage header/footer and CTA modal with autoads reference
description: Use https://www.autoads.dev/ as the structural reference for the homepage header, footer, and QR-code CTA modal. Update autocashback so '申请试用' and '联系开通' open a QR-code dialog instead of mailto links.
close_reason: Completed homepage header/footer refresh and unified QR CTA modal.

title: Refine homepage messaging and simplify technical detail
description: Update the homepage to remove negative framing such as manual-mode/no-public-API wording, replace the long hero line with a shorter slogan, and remove overly technical sections like script explanation so the landing page reads more like a product page.
close_reason: Refined homepage messaging, shortened the hero slogan, removed negative platform framing, and replaced technical/script-heavy sections with product-oriented landing page content.

title: Check production service and Postgres health
description: Verify the deployed production service is reachable and the production PostgreSQL database is healthy using the provided DATABASE_URL. Check HTTP availability, database connectivity, and core table status.
close_reason: Verified production site responds over HTTPS and the provided PostgreSQL database is reachable with all core tables present and seeded baseline data intact.

title: Introduce autobb-style migrations and startup DB init
description: Refactor autocashback to use autobb-style database initialization with migrations/ and pg-migrations/, consolidated init SQL files, migration_history tracking, and startup bootstrap that creates the target Postgres database then initializes or migrates schema from SQL files.
close_reason: Added autobb-style migrations/ and pg-migrations/ directories, consolidated init schema files, migration_history tracking, SQL-based schema initialization, and db:migrate script.

title: Fix Postgres bootstrap when target database does not exist
description: The production db bootstrap path currently fails with Postgres error 3D000 when DATABASE_URL points at a database that has not been created yet. Update bootstrap logic so it can connect to an administrative database, create the target database if missing, then apply schema/admin initialization. Verify with tests.
close_reason: Bootstrap now creates a missing Postgres database before schema/admin initialization and includes regression coverage.

title: 实现本地 SQLite 与生产 PostgreSQL 双数据库支持
description: 参考 /Users/jason/Documents/Kiro/autobb 的双数据库设计与服务启动流程，为 AutoCashBack 实现本地 SQLite、生产 PostgreSQL 的兼容数据库层与启动链路。
close_reason: Implemented dual-database adapter with local SQLite bootstrap, production PostgreSQL validation, startup bootstrap flow, and SQLite integration tests

title: 复核 SQLite 与 PostgreSQL 兼容性
description: 检查当前数据结构、数据库客户端与 SQL 语句是否同时兼容本地 SQLite 和生产 PostgreSQL，并明确差异与风险。
close_reason: Verified current database layer is PostgreSQL-only and not compatible with SQLite without an adapter and SQL rewrites

title: 修复 V1 验收残留品牌文案

Why this issue exists and what needs to be done

The repository has uncommitted frontend styling and component updates in apps/web that need to be validated, committed, and pushed to origin/main.

This task covers reviewing the pending diff at a high level, running applicable quality checks, creating a git commit, syncing beads state, and pushing the code to the remote repository.
close_reason: Committed and pushed pending web UI refresh changes

close_reason: Verified git push reports everything up-to-date; repository has no unpushed commits, but there are local uncommitted changes.

close_reason: Removed homepage signals card, cleaned related links, and tightened hero top spacing.

title: Refine marketing home and login entry surfaces
description: Continue the control-surface optimization by refreshing the public marketing homepage and login entry shell so they better match autocashback's green operating brand, remove any stale generic framing, and borrow safe structure cues from autobb where semantics overlap.
close_reason: Refreshed the public marketing homepage and login entry surfaces, added clearer operating entry copy, and verified build plus standalone rendering.

title: Add advanced admin user controls to match autobb parity
description: Follow up on /admin/users parity after the core management console alignment. Remaining gaps versus autobb require additional data model/API support: account enable/disable state, forced unlock, richer session/security alerts, and package/subscription metadata.
notes:
Extended admin login history into a mixed timeline: merged successful sessions with failed-login and lockout audit events, stored failure reasons on login_failed audit entries, and updated the /admin/users login-history modal to show success, failure, lockout, expiry, and revocation in one view. Package/subscription metadata is still the only major parity area left, and remains optional depending on product direction.
Added status-first triage on /admin/users: introduced all/risk/locked/disabled/active-session quick filters, enabled status sorting in listAdminUsers, and highlighted risk rows so operators can move directly from overview into the right remediation queue. Covered with route and sqlite tests for filtered pagination behavior.
Pushed /admin/users one step further toward overview-action-risk: overview cards now double as triage shortcuts, disabled counts can jump straight into the disabled queue, and the page now surfaces an action queue with the highest-priority users on the current page (locked, disabled, repeated failures, multi-session) plus one-click remediation.
